title: Software Update - DFU - Houston... screen
scenario: Verify that when a DFU failure occurs (e.g., headset turned off at update start), the app shows a "Houston..." screen with the specified error message and both Cancel and Retry buttons are active.
steps: 1. Initiate a DFU (Device Firmware Update) on the headset.
2. Trigger a failure during the update process (e.g., turn off the headset at the start of the update).
3. Observe the screen displayed on the app.
4. Verify that the app shows a 'Houston...' screen with instructions for an unsuccessful software update.

5. Confirm the screen includes the message: 'We have a problem. The software update for [DEVICE NAME] didn't successfully complete. Keep your Poly device and your mobile device nearby, connected to each other and the internet.'
6. Check that both a Cancel button and a Retry button are present on the screen.
7. Verify that both the Cancel and Retry buttons are active (i.e., tappable and functional).
expected: The app displays a "Houston..." screen with the specified error message, and both Cancel and Retry buttons are available and active.
